steps.t: Langhár can be found in Vegbár, the Beorning outpost in the Wolf-denes. You should talk to Langhár.
Skalla can be found in Vegbár, the Beorning outpost in the Wolf-denes. You should talk to Skalla.
Skalla has asked you to speak to the others around Vegbár, the Beorning outpost in the Wolf-denes. You should speak to the other Beornings around Vegb…
Skalla can be found in Vegbár, the Beorning outpost in the Wolf-denes. You should talk to Skalla.
Ainhard's homestead lies somewhere south of Vegbár in the Wolf-denes. You should travel to Ainhard's homestead.
Ainhard's homestead lies south of Vegbár in the Wolf-denes. You should travel to Ainhard's homestead.
